gold_claims.label: Ferrymen rumor about the tide bell
gold_claims.target_value: the tide bell answered back from the east pier market stairs during fog banks
value_patterns: the tide bell answered back from the east pier market stairs during fog banks
evidence_patterns: Night ferrymen whispered that the tide bell answered back from the east pier market stairs during fog banks.

gold_claims.label: Ferrymen issued oilcloth lanterns
gold_claims.target_value: Night ferrymen were assigned oilcloth lanterns for flood tide patrols along the east pier.
value_patterns: Night ferrymen were assigned oilcloth lanterns for flood tide patrols along the east pier.
evidence_patterns: Night ferrymen were assigned oilcloth lanterns for flood tide patrols along the east pier.

gold_claims.label: Ledger records dawn sack tolls
gold_claims.target_value: Quay toll ledger record shows tolls stood at two brass tokens for each dawn grain sack at first bell.
value_patterns: Quay toll ledger record shows tolls stood at two brass tokens for each dawn grain sack at first bell.
evidence_patterns: Quay toll ledger record shows tolls stood at two brass tokens for each dawn grain sack at first bell.

gold_claims.label: Tarred baskets stacked at the scales
gold_claims.target_value: Tarred grain baskets were stacked beside the quay scales before sunrise and left a resin smell in the loading lane.
value_patterns: Tarred grain baskets were stacked beside the quay scales before sunrise and left a resin smell in the loading lane.
evidence_patterns: Tarred grain baskets were stacked beside the quay scales before sunrise and left a resin smell in the loading lane.
